message:
feat: enhance git loader with date parsing and scanner error handling

Improvements to the git revision loading subsystem:

Date Parsing:
- Add parseDateString() helper that accepts multiple common formats:
  RFC3339, "2006-01-02", "2006-01-02 15:04", "2006-01-02 15:04:05"
- When git rev-parse fails on a revision spec, attempt to interpret it
  as a date and convert to git's HEAD@{<date>} reflog syntax
- Use time.Local for non-RFC3339 formats to match git's local time
  interpretation of reflog dates

Error Handling:
- Add scanner.Err() checks after reading git log output in both
  ListRevisions() and GetCommitsBetween() to catch I/O errors
- Prevents silent failures when parsing large git histories

These changes improve the --diff-since flag UX by accepting human-friendly
date formats like "2024-01-15" instead of requiring commit SHAs or git
reflog syntax.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
